project.title: HC-TRUST-LAYER Project Verification Context
project.purpose: Define repository-level HC:// verification map scope, terminology baseline, and trust-kernel navigation context.
project.validation_notes: Advisory-only documentation metadata; no runtime enforcement in this phase.

canonical_records.title: Canonical Record Boundaries
canonical_records.purpose: Map schema and deterministic record identity surfaces that preserve canonical record continuity and provenance.
canonical_records.validation_notes: Any boundary impact requires explicit human-supervised validation and canonical artifact continuity checks.

hash_validation.title: Hash Validation Continuity
hash_validation.purpose: Track hash-linked artifact and record continuity assumptions used by verification flows.
hash_validation.validation_notes: Do not claim cryptographic guarantees beyond implemented repository evidence and tests.

validators.title: Validator Execution Surfaces
validators.purpose: Index validator responsibilities, result normalization, and verification lifecycle boundaries.
validators.validation_notes: This index does not alter validator logic, runtime behavior, or workflow gates.

policy_evaluator.title: Policy Evaluator Decision Boundaries
policy_evaluator.purpose: Map policy interpretation surfaces and decision-path documentation for verification routing.
policy_evaluator.validation_notes: Policy-impacting edits require declared decision-path differences and audit trail continuity review.

verification_packages.title: Verification Package Artifacts
verification_packages.purpose: Index portable evidence package documentation used for reproducible verification and export boundaries.
verification_packages.validation_notes: Documentation-only index; no schema or package format contract changes are introduced here.

signing.title: Signing and Trust Anchor Boundaries
signing.purpose: Capture signing architecture references and trust anchor semantics relevant to HC:// verification.
signing.validation_notes: Any signing or trust-anchor semantic change requires escalated human-supervised validation.

trust_graph.title: Trust Graph Navigation
trust_graph.purpose: Index trust relationship and routing context documentation for impact analysis and review boundaries.
trust_graph.validation_notes: Advisory navigation only; trust scoring or runtime routing behavior is not modified.

protocol_graph.title: Protocol Graph Orientation
protocol_graph.purpose: Connect machine-readable protocol graph metadata with human-readable trust-kernel architecture references.
protocol_graph.validation_notes: Protocol graph metadata remains advisory and does not enforce runtime behavior.

dispute_challenge.title: Dispute and Challenge Pathways
dispute_challenge.purpose: Index governance and review pathways for contested records and supersession decisions.
dispute_challenge.validation_notes: No dispute automation claims; human-supervised adjudication remains required.

replay_detection.title: Replay and Duplicate Detection
replay_detection.purpose: Map replay/duplicate verification references for audit trail continuity and risk triage.
replay_detection.validation_notes: Index only; no replay detection algorithm changes or runtime controls are introduced.

federation.title: Federation Discovery and Sync
federation.purpose: Index multi-node federation boundaries for discovery, sync, and trust-routing context.
federation.validation_notes: No live federation guarantees are implied; documentation reflects current repository evidence.

offline_verification.title: Offline Verification Continuity
offline_verification.purpose: Map offline verification constraints and continuity boundaries without network dependency.
offline_verification.validation_notes: Offline paths remain documentation-defined and do not add runtime guarantees in this index.

verification_snapshots.title: Verification Snapshot References
verification_snapshots.purpose: Index reproducible verification state checkpoint references for audit and comparison.
verification_snapshots.validation_notes: Snapshot references are advisory and do not enforce runtime snapshot policies.

message_content_provenance.title: Message and Content Provenance
message_content_provenance.purpose: Track message/content lineage surfaces used to interpret verification and provenance continuity.
message_content_provenance.validation_notes: No autonomous provenance adjudication is introduced by this metadata index.

ai_model_provenance.title: AI Model Provenance
ai_model_provenance.purpose: Index model-context lineage documentation that informs human-supervised verification interpretation.
ai_model_provenance.validation_notes: Model provenance references are advisory and do not create autonomous governance finality.

agent_workspace.title: Agent Workspace Context
agent_workspace.purpose: Map repository-native agent context guidance, task routing, and documentation-first collaboration boundaries.
agent_workspace.validation_notes: Agent outputs remain advisory and require human-supervised validation for non-trivial trust-kernel impacts.

public_verification.title: Public Verification Surfaces
public_verification.purpose: Index external verification-facing API and routing documentation for boundary-aware review.
public_verification.validation_notes: No production-readiness claim is made; this index does not alter API behavior or enforcement.
